response.justification: Bogdan has extensive technical depth, strong open-source contributions to developer tools (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and clear leadership in mentoring and workshops, but lacks explicit evidence of people management experience beyond technical leadership and has no demonstrated mobile platform expertise, which is a preferred qualification for the role.
strengths: 8+ years of software development with deep tooling experience (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops mentoring engineers
Hands-on contributions to testing infrastructure and developer productivity tooling
concerns: No clear documentation of 2+ years in formal people management or team leadership
Lacks explicit mobile platform experience (iOS/Android) despite role focus
No mention of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change leadership
